title: Redstone Tweaks (Fork)
description: Improvements, overlays, and emissive to improve your redstone prowess
body:
Improvements, overlays, and emissives to improve your redstone powess.

Adds readouts for signal strength, note, better repeater delay visibility, emissives, hopper/dispenser/dropper directions, etc.

Requires Continuity if you want the emissives to work.

OF NOTE: the 3D redstone pack must be above the redstone tweaks pack for the signal strength overlay to work.

**NOTE**
This is a fork of [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstonetweaksresourcepack) updated for 1.21.10
